tagline: Building scalable data systems that process high-volume data and support real-world analytics.
description: Data & Software Engineer with 3+ years building ETL/ELT pipelines, REST APIs, ML systems, and cloud data platforms on AWS and Azure. MS Data Science @ University at Buffalo.

roles.detailed: Data Engineer | Python, SQL, AWS, PySpark, Kafka | Open to Summer 2026 & Full-Time Roles

bio: I build scalable data systems that process high-volume data and support real-world analytics. Improved pipeline throughput by 40% processing 200+ files/day, built real-time pipelines handling 500K+ events/hour with Kafka and Spark, reduced query latency by 30%, and processed 100GB+ datasets using PySpark with 65% faster runtimes. With 3+ years across data engineering, analytics, and machine learning, I work with Python, SQL, AWS, Azure, PySpark, Kafka, Airflow, Snowflake, Flask, FastAPI, Docker, Tableau, and Power BI. Currently a Graduate Research Assistant (AI & Data Systems) at the University at Buffalo under Prof. Siwei Lyu, engineering backend and data infrastructure for deepfake-detection research. MS in Data Science at UB (Dec 2026). Former Cloud & Data Engineer at Broadridge. President of Computer Society of India (2020–2023). Open to Data Engineering, Data Science, and Software Engineering roles.

experience.company: University at Buffalo — AI & Data Science
bullets: Built Flask/FastAPI REST APIs for real-time ML inference; reduced latency from 580ms to 378ms, raising throughput by 28%.
Developed React, Flask, and Jinja frontend/backend components for AI-driven application workflows.
Engineered PySpark workflows on 100GB+ datasets; cut runtime by 60% via partitioning and broadcast joins.
Architected Python ETL pipelines ingesting 50K+ multi-modal records into AWS S3 for Deep-O-Meter.
Implemented MLflow versioning and data lineage across 10+ configs; reduced QA effort by 30%.
experience.desc: AI & data systems research under Prof. Siwei Lyu at UB Media Forensic Lab.

bullets: Engineered AWS and SFTP pipelines processing 200+ files/day; improved throughput by 40% and saved 15 hrs/week.
Maintained Sterling File Gateway enterprise workflows with 99.8% system uptime across 12+ production pipelines.
Optimized 20+ SQL queries and redesigned 4 dimensional schemas; reduced query latency by 30%.
Built monitoring frameworks (CloudWatch + PagerDuty); cut incident response time by 25%.
Instituted CI/CD test suites across 15+ workflows, cutting post-deployment defects by 40%.
experience.desc: Enterprise cloud data engineering, SOX-compliant pipelines, and production observability.

bullets: Built Python ETL pipelines ingesting 500K+ records from 10+ sources; reduced processing time by 45%.
Designed relational schemas and indexing strategies; improved query performance by 60%.
Developed 15+ Tableau and Power BI dashboards; reduced manual reporting by 6 hrs/week.
Implemented data validation frameworks ensuring 99.5% accuracy across 2M+ records.
experience.desc: End-to-end data pipelines, analytics dashboards, and database optimization for clients.

bullets: Led weekly technical seminars and hands-on activities for student skill development in IT.
Established internships with professionals and direct interaction with DRDO scientists.
Increased internship and job placement rates through coding, cryptography, and problem-solving programs.
experience.desc: Student leadership driving technical education, career programs, and industry connections.

bullets: Managed document delivery workflows including scanning, processing, and distribution of library materials.
Assisted users with library systems, technology tools, and service workflows.
Maintained accuracy through detailed record-keeping and verification processes.
Handled high-volume requests ensuring timely fulfillment and organized processing.
experience.desc: Campus library operations supporting document delivery and user services at UB.

bullets: Monitored equipment usage and enforced safety protocols across fitness facilities.
Supported daily operations including equipment checks and maintenance coordination.
Delivered high-quality customer service assisting users with equipment and facility policies.
Contributed to smooth operations through staff coordination and proactive issue resolution.
